compensating_controls: Mastra runtime source does not import @ai-sdk/provider-utils.
The affected createJsonResponseHandler and createJsonErrorResponseHandler functions are not called.
The runtime does not make model calls or parse untrusted external provider responses.
Runtime commands are bounded deterministic verification commands, not a public daemon.
The scheduled security workflow fails when this acceptance reaches review_by.
remediation_trigger: Upgrade when Mastra removes the v5 compatibility alias or an upstream patched v3 release exists.
claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded reachability-based risk acceptance, not a vulnerability fix, false-positive claim, or vulnerability-free certification.
